summary: Iteration 38: Admin All-Users CRUD and Hard Quota Regression Testing. Backend API tests (16/16) all passed via pytest - confirmed GET /api/admin/all-users, POST create user, PUT update user (name/role/status/agency_id), DELETE user. Hard quota regression tests (3 passed, 6 skipped due to auth rate limiting). Frontend UI testing blocked by rate limiting on login (429 - 'Çok fazla istek. Lütfen daha sonra tekrar deneyin.' with 300s cooldown). Code review confirms AdminAllUsersPage.jsx implements correct data-testid attributes and CRUD UI flows.

integration_issues.issue: Rate limited on login endpoint (429) - 300 second cooldown prevents frontend validation

passed_tests: pytest test_hard_quota_enforcement_http.py (3/9) - PASS (6 skipped due to rate limiting)
critical_code_review_comments: SUCCESS: AdminAllUsersPage.jsx implements full CRUD UI with correct data-testid attributes
SUCCESS: Create user dialog has data-testid='create-user-dialog', 'create-user-name', 'create-user-email', 'create-user-password', 'create-user-agency', 'create-user-role', 'create-user-submit'
SUCCESS: Edit user dialog has data-testid='edit-user-dialog', 'edit-user-name', 'edit-user-email', 'edit-user-agency', 'edit-user-role', 'edit-user-status', 'edit-user-submit'
SUCCESS: Delete confirmation dialog has data-testid='delete-user-dialog', 'delete-user-confirm'
SUCCESS: Table row actions have data-testid='toggle-status-{id}', 'edit-user-{id}', 'delete-user-{id}', 'role-select-{id}'
SUCCESS: Backend admin_agency_users.py all_users_router correctly implements GET/POST/PUT/DELETE endpoints with proper org/tenant isolation
SUCCESS: Backend validates duplicate email (409), user not found (404), invalid agency (404)

success_rate.frontend: N/A - rate limited on login, code review confirms correct implementation

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create and cleanup TEST_ prefixed users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin all-users CRUD is fully working (16/16 backend tests passed). Rate limiting blocked frontend Playwright testing but code review confirms correct implementation. Hard quota regression endpoints still respond correctly. Frontend AdminAllUsersPage.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for search, filters, dialogs, and table actions. Test agencies used: Demo Acenta (f5f7a2a3-5de1-4d65-b700-ec4f9807d83a), Demo Acente A (a8456a97-f714-4c69-bc7e-d58c3b7d088d), Demo Acente B (301121c7-30c1-4048-b0d4-9b51c38915ac).

feature_validation_summary.GET_api_admin_all_users: PASS - Returns list of agency users with required fields (id, email, name, roles, status, agency_id, agency_name)
feature_validation_summary.POST_api_admin_all_users: PASS - Creates new user with agency_admin or agency_agent role
feature_validation_summary.PUT_api_admin_all_users_user_id: PASS - Updates name, email, role, status, agency_id with proper validation
feature_validation_summary.DELETE_api_admin_all_users_user_id: PASS - Hard deletes user with proper validation
feature_validation_summary.error_handling: PASS - Returns 409 for duplicate email, 404 for user/agency not found, 401 for unauthorized
feature_validation_summary.frontend_all_users_page: CODE REVIEW PASS - Implements search, filter, create/edit/delete dialogs with correct data-testid
